h1.visual_description: Serif font, right-aligned at the top margin, featuring a chapter number followed by a period and the chapter title.

visual_matchers.semantic_meaning: Opening paragraph of a chapter or a new thematic section.
Standard body paragraph following an opening paragraph.

visual_matchers.pattern: Single integer located at the bottom right corner
